item.title: who-we-are-v2
item.dc:creator: mandeep
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.16" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"][et_pb_column _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" type="4_4"][et_pb_image src="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/320A0544-edited-1-e1706633548971.jpg" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" title_text="320A0544" border_radii="on|10px|10px|10px|10px" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_column _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" type="4_4"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"]

Baila Canarias (previously known as Salsa Vagabundo), we have been teaching Salsa and Bachata in Los Gigantes, Puerto Santiago and Playa San Juan since the beginning of 2022. We all work towards the same goal. To spread the joy of social dancing to as many people as possible. We love everything to do with dance, but our specialities are Latin social dances. Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba and more. If you can't wait to meet us in person, you can read about us.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" column_structure="1_2,1_2" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"][et_pb_column _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" type="1_2"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0" custom_margin="11px|||||" custom_padding="0px||3px|||" min_height="216.8px"]

Balint Markoth

With almost 20 years of experience in Cuban Dances, Bálint has been trained by top educators in Europe at renowned dance festivals. His classes embody a lively and enjoyable atmosphere, combining excellent teaching with a focus on partner communication and musicality.

 

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" type="1_2"][et_pb_image src="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Balint.jpeg" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0" title_text="Balint" border_radii="on|10px|10px|10px|10px" alt="Balint, a picture of the salsa teacher"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" column_structure="1_2,1_2" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"][et_pb_column _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" type="1_2"][et_pb_image src="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Levente-Vagabundo.jpg" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" title_text="Levente-Vagabundo" border_radii="on|10px|10px|10px|10px" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" type="1_2"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0" custom_padding="||0px|||"]

Levente Feher

Levi has been dancing and moving most of his life. He profoundly loves Bachata, Salsa, kizomba and everything to do with dancing. Read more about Levi.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
Who we are

Suggested text: Our website address is: https://www.bailacanarias.com.

Comments

Suggested text: When visitors leave comments on the site we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the visitor’s IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.

An anonymized string created from your email address (also called a hash) may be provided to the Gravatar service to see if you are using it. The Gravatar service privacy policy is available here: https://automattic.com/privacy/. After approval of your comment, your profile picture is visible to the public in the context of your comment.

Media

Suggested text: If you upload images to the website, you should avoid uploading images with embedded location data (EXIF GPS) included. Visitors to the website can download and extract any location data from images on the website.

Cookies

Suggested text: If you leave a comment on our site you may opt-in to saving your name, email address and website in cookies. These are for your convenience so that you do not have to fill in your details again when you leave another comment. These cookies will last for one year.

If you visit our login page, we will set a temporary cookie to determine if your browser accepts cookies. This cookie contains no personal data and is discarded when you close your browser.

When you log in, we will also set up several cookies to save your login information and your screen display choices. Login cookies last for two days, and screen options cookies last for a year. If you select "Remember Me", your login will persist for two weeks. If you log out of your account, the login cookies will be removed.

If you edit or publish an article, an additional cookie will be saved in your browser. This cookie includes no personal data and simply indicates the post ID of the article you just edited. It expires after 1 day.

Embedded content from other websites

Suggested text: Articles on this site may include embedded content (e.g. videos, images, articles, etc.). Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if the visitor has visited the other website.

These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged in to that website.

Who we share your data with

Suggested text: If you request a password reset, your IP address will be included in the reset email.

How long we retain your data

Suggested text: If you leave a comment, the comment and its metadata are retained indefinitely. This is so we can recognize and approve any follow-up comments automatically instead of holding them in a moderation queue.

For users that register on our website (if any), we also store the personal information they provide in their user profile. All users can see, edit, or delete their personal information at any time (except they cannot change their username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.

What rights you have over your data

Suggested text: If you have an account on this site, or have left comments, you can request to receive an exported file of the personal data we hold about you, including any data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any personal data we hold about you. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes.

Where your data is sent

Suggested text: Visitor comments may be checked through an automated spam detection service.

Intensive 1 Day Beginner’s Cuban Salsa course

item.title: What is Bachata?
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded: A genre of music and social dance originating from the Dominican Republic. Nowadays, Bachata is a global phenomenon danced all around the world. Bachata has evolved from bolero, son and merengue and is usually danced with partners.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: A genre of music and social dance originating from the Dominican Republic. Today, Bachata is a global phenomenon danced all around the world.
Dance with us
Intensive 1 Day Beginner’s Cuban Salsa course
Learn to dance with us

Salsa, Bachata, and Kizomba in Tenerife

Tenerife offers many events around the island catering to salsa, bachata, and kizomba dancers. Here are some of the most popular social dance parties. Although most of these are regular events, please check if they happen on the day, as cancellations and changes often happen. If you would like to learn to dance you can check out our dance classes and courses.

Weekly dance parties

Monday & Tuesday

Monday and Tuesday there are no weekly parties, however you can always find classes in the many dance schools on the island.

Wednesday

Afrolatin Night
Kendo Lounge Bar en Las Americas - Tenerife Sur
Bachata y Salsa

Thursday

Tempo's Latinos
Las Americas - Tenerife South
Salsa y Bachata

Friday

Deseo en Casablanca
Las Americas - Tenerife South
Salsa, Bachata

Baila Q' Baila
Las Chafiras - Tenerife South
Salsa, Bachata, Merengue

Saturday

Sunday

Latin Flow en Casablanca
Las Americas - Tenerife South
Bachata and Salsa

Baila Q' Baila
Las Chafiras - Tenerife Southeast
Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba

Where to social dance in Tenerife?
Find the best weekly salsa, bachata, and kizomba parties in Tenerife. There are SBK parties most days of week around the island.

Tenerife offers many events around the island catering to salsa, bachata, and kizomba dancers. Here are some of the most popular social dance parties. Although most of these are regular events, please check if they happen on the day, as cancellations and changes often happen. If you would like to learn to dance you can check out our dance classes and courses.

Weekly dance parties

Monday

Monday is the only day of the week where there are no parties. You can always find classes in the many dance schools on the island.

Tuesday

Guajira
Las Americas - Tenerife South
100% Salsa

Wednesday

Afrolatin Night
El Medano - Tenerife Southeast
Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba

Thursday

Latino Flow
Costa Adeje - Tenerife South
Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba

Tempo's Latinos
Las Americas - Tenerife South
Bachata and Salsa

Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba with sometimes special nights and themes

Bailongo's Social

Sunday

Tardeo de Domingo

Bachata and Salsa

Domingo Latino
Santa Cruz de Tenerife - North
Salsa and Bachata

Baila Q' Baila
Las Chafiras - Tenerife Southeast
Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba

These are regular events and are always subject to change. There are a lot of additional ad-hoc events as well. It is best to check on Sociales en Tenerife for the most up-to-date events happening.

If you are looking to dance in Gran Canaria checkout Live Gran Canaria.

Baila Canarias (previously known as Salsa Vagabundo), we have been teaching Salsa and Bachata in Los Gigantes, Puerto Santiago and Playa San Juan since the beginning of 2022. We all work towards the same goal. To spread the joy of social dancing to as many people as possible. We love everything to do with dance, but our specialities are Latin social dances. Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba and more. If you can't wait to meet us in person, you can read about us.

Balint Markoth

With almost 20 years of experience in Cuban Dances, Bálint has been trained by top educators in Europe at renowned dance festivals. His classes embody a lively and enjoyable atmosphere, combining excellent teaching with a focus on partner communication and musicality.

item.title: Levente Feher
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
Levente, one of our founders, has been dancing and moving most of his life. As a kid in Hungary, he entered the world of dance, learning ballet, hip-hop and Hungarian folk dances for a couple of years at school. Following that, he explored the world of theatre and drama.

His first experience with Salsa and Bachata was at university at King's College London, thanks to the KCL Dance Society. He fell in love with both styles from the very first class.

He has been a dedicated learner ever since, learning from the best teachers in the UK and at festivals around the world. He also visited the competition world briefly, winning various amateur competitions in Hungary and placing 2nd place in the BachataStars Open England Final in 2017.

He came to realise that the style these competitions represent is far from him. Levi is much more interested in the social dancing and cultural aspects of these dances, as that is what he wants to share with the world.

In 2016, he joined the Ritmo Latino London dance school, where he began his teaching career. He taught at some of the most iconic Latin dance party landmarks in London and in the UK. As his career progressed, he also joined Evidance4You dance school in Hungary and Los Rumberos Dance School in London, where he worked with kids aged 4-26. During his career, he has been part of various performance and choreography groups and also choreographed and trained the UCL Bachata Teams two years in a row.

Following COVID-19, he relocated to Tenerife, where he cofounded Baila Canarias to continue sharing his love for these amazing dances.

item.title: Where is Bachata from?
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
Bachata, the popular music genre originating from the Dominican Republic, encompasses heartfelt lyrics filled with romance, sensuality, and alluring rhythms.

Born in the Dominican Republic on the island of Hispaniola, Bachata became its own distinct rhythm in the early 1960s.

item.title: Intensive 1 Day Beginner's Bachata course
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
Discover the exciting dyanmic world of Cuabn Salsa. Learn to control your body and to unite with the music from the very basic rythms to the more complex music elements.

“ Fedezd fel a Kubai Salsa izgalmas energikus világát. Tanuld meg uralni a testedet és megélni a zenét az egyszerűbb alapritmustól az egészen komplex zenei dinamikákig. Garantáltan nem fogsz tudni megülni erről a ligkíválóbb kubai zenék gondoskodnak. A képzés teljesen kezdő szintről indul az alaplépésektől a páros táncokban esszenciális komunikáción át a Rueda de Casinóig.

Mi az Kubai Casino avagy Kubai Salsa.
Egy a Son-ra, Guaguanco-ra , Chachára és még egy tucat klasszikus táncra épülő, dinamikus vidám zenei műfaj és táncstílus. Jelemzője, hogy lendületes és energikus, gyorsan változó figura kombinációk tarkítják mely az adott alapritmusra építkezik. Fontos a párok közti kommunikáció és a zeneiség. Sajátítsd el ennek a különleges páros táncnak az alapjait.

Mi az a Rueda de Casino?
A Rueda vagy karika a kubai casino egy jellegzetes formája melyben a párok körben helyezkednek el és izgalmas vicces játékokon keresztül élik meg a zenét és a tánc nyújtotta örömöket. Jellemzője a folyamatos párváltás és pikáns játékosság. Minden szív és minden láb egy ritmusra dobban.

A te oktatód

Bálint közel 20 éve foglalkozik kubai táncokkal. Tudását és képzési technikáját a legkiválóbb Európában fellelhető oktatók csiszolták rangos táncfesztiválokon. Fontos hangsúlyt fektet az órai jó hangulat mellett a táncosok képzésére - a párok közötti kommunikációra és a zeneiségre is. “

What is Bachata?

The brother of Salsa and the child of Bolero and Merengue. Bachata is a fun and easy-to-learn dance and music originating from the Dominican Republic.

Secure your spot!

To secure your spot and sign up, please buy your ticket through our Eventbrite event or get in touch via email or phone at levi@leventefeher.com / ‪+34 629 17 82 42‬

SIGN UP NOW

Price

€20 per person or €35 if you come as a couple.
For all ages. No experience and no partner are needed! We will match you up with a partner!

Schedule

10:00-10:15: Registration
10:15-12:00: Block 1
12:00-13:00: Lunch break
13:00-15:45: Block 2
15:45: Sad goodbye

Your teacher

Levente Feher, a teacher with over 6 years of teaching experience. In 2017, at the BachataStars England Final placed 2nd place. He specialises in teaching Bachata foundations, musicality and connection.

Where and when?

Saturday 4th of November in the brand-new Arkadia Ballet and Pilates studio in Los Gigantes.

item.title: Intensive 1 Day Beginner’s Cuban Salsa course
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
Discover the exciting, dynamic world of Cuban Salsa. Learn to control your body and unite with the music, from the basic rhythms to the more complex music elements. Guaranteed, you cannot stay still listening to the best Cuban Salsas. The course is from the absolute beginner level. We will get you to dance the basic steps followed by dancing in partners until we are all dancing in Ruedas de Casino in one big group.

Secure your spot!

To secure your spot and sign up, please buy your ticket through our Eventbrite event or get in touch via email or phone at levi@leventefeher.com / +34 666 74 55 66

SIGN UP NOW

What is Cuban Casino, also known as Cuban Salsa?

One is a dynamic, fun music and dance style based on Son, Guaguanco, ChaCha and a dozen other Latin and African music genres and dances. Its main characteristic is that it is energetic and full of rapidly changing dance combinations based on the main rhythm. Communication between couples and musicality is essential. Master the basics of this extraordinary partner dance.

What is Rueda de Casino?

The Rueda or circle is the typical form of Cuban Casino in which partners take place in a circle and perform exciting games through which they experience the music and the joy it provides. Its characteristics are constant partner changes and piquant playfulness.

Price

€20 per person or €35 if you come as a couple.
For all ages. No experience and no partner are needed! We will match you up with a partner!

Schedule

10:00-10:15: Registration
10:15-12:00: Block 1
12:00-13:00: Lunch break
13:00-15:45: Block 2
15:45: Sad goodbye

Your teacher

Bálint has been working with Cuban Dances for close to 20 years. His knowledge and technique have been trained by the most outstanding educators in Europe throughout various prestigious dance festivals. He maintains a fun mood throughout his classes while delivering excellent teaching, emphasising communication between partners and musicality.

Where and when?

Saturday 2nd of December in the brand-new Arkadia Ballet and Pilates studio in Los Gigantes.
Calle Petunia, 3, 38683 Acantilados de Los Gigantes, Santa Cruz de Tenerife (Gigansol complex next to the SuperDino)

Questions

To secure your spot and sign up, please buy your ticket through our Eventbrite event or get in touch via email or phone at levi@leventefeher.com / +34 666 74 55 66

SIGN UP NOW

item.title: Latin Rhythms Unleashed: Baila Canarias Free Open Day
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
🎉 Get ready to dance the day away at our exciting free open day! Join us at Baila Canarias for a taste of the lively world of Latin dance - it's your chance to have fun and try different styles without any commitments, all for free, no payment needed! 🕺💃

REGISTER NOW

🌈 No Partner? No Worries!

Whether you're coming alone or with friends, everyone is welcome! You don't need any previous dance experience - just bring yourself and a smile!

🚀 Discover Your Dance Passion

We're starting new beginner courses soon, and this open day is the perfect sneak peek. Feel the rhythm, enjoy the movement, and see which Latin dance style captures your heart.

🎊 Let's Have Fun

Leave your worries behind and join us for a day filled with laughter and joy. This is more than just dancing; it's a chance to make new friends and create unforgettable memories.

📅 Save the Date

Saturday 10th of February in the brand-new Arkadia Ballet and Pilates studio in Los Gigantes.
Calle Petunia, 3, 38683 Acantilados de Los Gigantes, Santa Cruz de Tenerife (Gigansol complex next to the SuperDino)

🌟 Don't Miss Out! Join the Dance Party!

Whether you're a seasoned dancer or a first-timer, this event is for everyone. See you on the dance floor for a day of music, laughter, and great company! 💫

Schedule

10:00-11:00 Merengue
11:00-12:00 Salsa
12:00-13:30 Lunch break
13:30-14:30 Bachata
14:30-15:30 Kizomba

Sign up to reserve your place

The event is free, you just simply need to register to reserve your space. If you come with a partner please register separately so we can keep track of attendance, we have limited spaces. If you have any questions please get in touch with us.

REGISTER NOW

item.title: Our dance styles
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
Embark on a dance journey like no other at Baila Canarias, where passion meets rhythm and every step tells a story. Our dance school is a vibrant hub for enthusiasts seeking to explore the diverse tapestry of Latin dance. Get ready to discover the magic of movement, the thrill of expression, and the joy of connection.
Explore the Rhythms: At Baila Canarias, we celebrate the richness of dance through a variety of styles that cater to every taste and skill level. Whether you're drawn to the sultry beats of salsa, the romantic sway of bachata, the energetic pulse of merengue, or the infectious rhythms of cha-cha-cha, we have something for everyone.

If you are ready to start your journey see what classes and events we have coming up our dance with us page. If you want to social dance see Where to dance in Tenerife.

Bachata
Música del Amargue. Bitterness, sadness, love, heartbreak, and the love of your life (for this week). What else could describe Bachata? A beautiful genre of music and dance originating from the Dominican Republic, now danced all around the world

Merengue
One of the funnest dance styles that can be found anywhere in the world. Also originating from the Dominican Republic it is danced from the moment you take your first steps as a child. Super easy to get started and take your first steps.

Salsa
Everyone heard about Salsa, but few really know about its diverse and rich culture. The word "Salsa" is an umbrella term represents a huge variety of different styles and rhythms. Dive right in and explore the amazing world it has to offer.

Kizomba
All the way from Angola, a beautiful, romantic genre of music and one of the most popular styles danced around the world. Slow, or upbeat, it will find its way into your heart.

Ready to start your journey? See our classes and events.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: At Baila Canarias, explore the diverse tapestry of Latin dance styles, including salsa, bachata, merengue, and kizomba! Discover the thrill of expression & joy of connection with us!

item.title: Open Day Sign up
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
Congratulations! 🌟 You've officially reserved your spot for the Baila Canarias Open Day. Get ready for an unforgettable experience filled with rhythm, joy, and the thrill of dance! We can't wait to welcome you to our vibrant community.

Keep an eye on your inbox for event details, and prepare to dance your heart out. Feel free to explore more about our dance styles and classes on our website. Let the countdown to the celebration begin!

In the meanwhile why not invite your friends?

item.title: New Beginners Bachata Group
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" min_height="453.8px" custom_margin="-87px|||||" custom_padding="0px||0px|||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" background_size="initial" background_position="top_left" background_repeat="repeat" min_height="593.6px" custom_padding="0px||0px||true|" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.16" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Are you ready to unleash your inner dancer and add some fun to your Tuesday evenings? Look no further because Baila Canarias is thrilled to announce our brand new Beginners Bachata classes! Whether you're a complete novice or have two left feet, these classes are tailor-made just for you. No prior experience? No problem! You don't even need a partner to join in on the fun. We're all about spreading joy through dance, and we can't wait to welcome you to our vibrant community.

Join us every Tuesday from 8:00pm to 9:30pm at Arkadia Balet and Pilates in Puerto Santiago, where our passionate instructors will guide you through the basics of Bachata with infectious energy and enthusiasm. Get ready to groove, laugh, and make new friends along the way. With each step, you'll gain confidence and unlock the magic of this sensual dance style.

Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to add some spice to your life and discover the joy of dance. Sign up now for our classes and embark on an unforgettable journey filled with rhythm, laughter, and unforgettable memories. Let's dance our way to happiness together! 💃🕺

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_video src="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mXIgwjmSxGU" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_video][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" custom_margin="-2px|||||" global_colors_info="{}"]

Class details

Weekly classes designed to teach you the fundamentals of dancing bachata socially.

You will learn:

  • Dance floor etiquette
  • Posture and balance
  • Correct frame for leading and following
  • Hip movement
  • Timing and rhythm
  • Basic steps and turns
  • Basic partner holds
  • Basic leading and following technique
  • How to have fun and have an amazing time dancing

Where and when?

Starting from 13th of August on Tuesday at 8:00pm at Arakdia Ballet Studio in Puerto Santiago.

item.excerpt:encoded: Learn to dance Bachata in this course aimed at beginners in Los Gigantes. Have fun, be active and make new friends!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Shake it up this Tuesday evening! Baila Canarias is delighted to present their Beginners Bachata classes in Puerto Santiago. Learn the basics of Bachata without any prior experience or a partner.
Beginner's Bachata Classes: Learn To Dance From Scratch in Puerto Santiago!
Let the beat take you - join us at Baila Canarias for our Beginners Bachata classes every Tuesday! Learn the basics of this amazing dance style with passion and enthusiasm. Bachata at its best!

<iframe title="Baila Canarias - Intensive Bachata Weekend" width="1080" height="608" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/mXIgwjmSxGU?feature=oembed" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Are you ready to unleash your inner dancer and add some fun to your Monday evenings? Look no further because Baila Canarias is thrilled to announce our brand new Beginners Bachata Course! Whether you're a complete novice or have two left feet, this course is tailor-made just for you. No prior experience? No problem! You don't even need a partner to join in on the fun. We're all about spreading joy through dance, and we can't wait to welcome you to our vibrant community.

Join us every Monday from 7:00pm to 9:00pm at Turbo Rehab in Puerto Santiago, where our passionate instructors will guide you through the basics of Bachata with infectious energy and enthusiasm. Get ready to groove, laugh, and make new friends along the way. With each step, you'll gain confidence and unlock the magic of this sensual dance style.

Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to add some spice to your life and discover the joy of dance. Sign up now for our monthly course and embark on an unforgettable journey filled with rhythm, laughter, and unforgettable memories. Let's dance our way to happiness together! 💃🕺✨

Course details

Weekly progressive course designed to teach you the fundamentals of dancing bachata socially.

You will learn:

  • Dance floor etiquette
  • Posture and balance
  • Correct frame for leading and following
  • Hip movement
  • Timing and rhythm
  • Basic steps and turns
  • Basic partner holds
  • Basic leading and following technique
  • How to have fun and have an amazing time dancing

Where and when?

Starting from 8th of April on Monday at 7:00pm at Turbo Rehab in Puerto Santiago.

Calle Antonio González Barrios
Edificio Sunset
38683
Puerto de Santiago
Santa Cruz de Tenerife

Course duration and price

The course is four weeks long, starting on the 8th of April and finishes on the 29th of April, taking place every Monday 7:00 to 9:00pm. The total cost is 40€/person for the whole course. You can join the course latest on the 15th of April, if you cannot commit to the whole length of the course please get in touch with us and will work something out.

Register

If you have any questions or to reserve your place please get in touch by email or phone at contact@bailacanarias.com / +34 666 74 55 66 or buy your tickets online.

SIGN UP NOW

Are you ready to unleash your inner dancer and add some fun to your Tuesday evenings? Look no further because Baila Canarias is thrilled to announce our brand new Beginners Bachata classes! Whether you’re a complete novice or have two left feet, these classes are tailor-made just for you. No prior experience? No problem! You don’t even need a partner to join in on the fun. We’re all about spreading joy through dance, and we can’t wait to welcome you to our vibrant community.
Join us every Tuesday from 8:00pm to 9:30pm at Arkadia Balet and Pilates in Puerto Santiago, where our passionate instructors will guide you through the basics of Bachata with infectious energy and enthusiasm. Get ready to groove, laugh, and make new friends along the way. With each step, you’ll gain confidence and unlock the magic of this sensual dance style.
Don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity to add some spice to your life and discover the joy of dance. Sign up now for our classes and embark on an unforgettable journey filled with rhythm, laughter, and unforgettable memories. Let’s dance our way to happiness together! 💃🕺
Class details
Weekly classes designed to teach you the fundamentals of dancing bachata socially.
You will learn:

Dance floor etiquette
Posture and balance
Correct frame for leading and following
Hip movement
Timing and rhythm
Basic steps and turns
Basic partner holds
Basic leading and following technique
How to have fun and have an amazing time dancing

Where and when?
Starting from 13th of August on Tuesday at 8:00pm at Arakdia Ballet Studio in Puerto Santiago.

Arkadia Ballet and Pilates
Calle Petunia 3 (Gigansol complex)
38683
Los Gigantes
Santa Cruz de Tenerife

Class duration and price
The classes are running every Tuesday, starting on the 13th of August, taking place every Tuesday 20:00 to 21:30. Classes are €10 or you can sign up for a month for €35. You can join the classes, no commitment needed.
Register
If you have any questions or to reserve your place please get in touch by email or phone at contact@bailacanarias.com / +34 629 17 82 42 or reserve your place below.

Reserve your space now

Register with your details to reserve your spot for this course. We will send you all the necessary information and other news that might interest you. We will never spam you and you can unsubscribe any time.

Success!

What styles are you interested in learning?

Register

item.title: New Beginners Salsa Course April
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.16" custom_padding="0px|||||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Do you want to meet new people? Do you like having fun with others? Do you want to move a bit more? The time is here to start a new and amazing hobby. We at Baila Canarias are happy to announce our new Beginners - Open Level level Salsa Course. You don't need to have a partner or previous experience in dancing. Our classes are fun and energetic. This is the best you can do after a long day. We are going to fill you with positive energy in our lovely colorful social group.

Classes are from 8:00 pm to 9:30 pm at Turbo Rehab in Puerto Santiago - 2x45 minutes - Our experienced instructors will lead you through all the first steps, the basics of Cuban Salsa - Casino Cubano. We are going to learn how to communicate with your partner - how to listen the music - how to use your body parts with control and freely - how to work together with other couples in the form of Rueda or Circle - finding new friends and discovering a whole new world.

Don't miss the chance, be part of it now, take the chance to learn and develop yourself to reach confidence and a thing that makes you smile every day. Find the rhythm, find the joy, and gain some nice memories. Join us now and start your dance journey next Wednesday!

Course details

A weekly progressive course designed to teach you the fundamentals of dancing Salsa Cubana/Rueda de Casino.

You will learn:

  • Musicality and rhythm
  • Basic steps and turns
  • Dance floor etiquette
  • Basic salsa figures
  • Body movement and isolation
  • Connection in leading and following
  • Chest and Hip movement
  • Leading techniques
  • Basic improvisation skills
  • How to enjoy the music and interpret it to your partner and your body

 

Where and when?

Starting from the 10th of April on Monday at 8:00 pm at Turbo Rehab in Puerto Santiago.

Course duration and price

You can join the course anytime, if you cannot commit to the whole length of the course please get in touch with us and we will find a way.

Register

If you have any questions or to reserve your place please get in touch by email or phone at contact@bailacanarias.com / +34 666 74 55 66 or reserve your place below.

Make new friends, start a healthy hobby, and join our dancing family. Beginners and improvers bachata dance classes in Puerto Santiago.

We offer a variety of dance styles. Do you want to get lost in the mesmerising social circle of a Cuban Rueda? Move your hips to the rhythm of the conga? Find your soul in the guitars of Bachata? Whatever your needs, we got you.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][ba_card photo="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/320A0372.jpg" title="Salsa" description="

Cubano, Timba, Casino, Rueda. What are they you wonder? Come find out and take your first steps with us.

" image_height="200px" overlay_icon_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" overlay_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="gcid-d5f4cf15-2259-4c59-9dfb-100503dc1e96" min_height="380px" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-d5f4cf15-2259-4c59-9dfb-100503dc1e96%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}"][/ba_card][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][ba_card photo="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Levi-Jade-Thumbnail.jpg" title="Bachata" description="

" image_height="200px" overlay_icon_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" overlay_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="gcid-d5f4cf15-2259-4c59-9dfb-100503dc1e96" min_height="380px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-d5f4cf15-2259-4c59-9dfb-100503dc1e96%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}"][/ba_card][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][ba_card photo="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DSC_6354-slider.jpg" title="Kizomba" description="

Social dancers by heart

We live for social dancing and our passion is to is spread this wonder to as many people as we can. Will you join our dance journey?

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Start the year dancing

Make new friends, start a healthy hobby, and join our dancing family. Beginners and improvers bachata dance classes in Puerto Santiago.
See our schedule

Are you ready to start your dance journey?

We offer a variety of dance styles. Do you want to get lost in the mesmerising social circle of a Cuban Rueda? Move your hips to the rhythm of the conga? Find your soul in the guitars of Bachata? Whatever your needs, we got you.

Salsa

Cubano, Timba, Casino, Rueda. What are they you wonder? Come find out and take your first steps with us.

Bachata

Música del Amargue. Bitterness, sadness, love, heartbreak, and the love of your life (for this week) what else could describe Bachata?

Kizomba

With its rich culture, history, and even more beautiful music; you won't be able to resist falling in love with Kizomba.

About us

Hi, we are Baila Canarias!

Social dancers by heart
We live for social dancing and our passion is to is spread this wonder to as many people as we can. Will you join our dance journey?
 
Contact us

Let's keep in touch

If you would to hear about our upcoming events, classes, courses, parties and events sign up for our mailing list. You will be first to hear about everything worth knowing. We take your privacy seriously and we will never spam you. If you change your mind you can unsubscribe anytime.

Success!

What styles are you interested in learning?

Subscribe
A social dance school in Tenerife based in Los Gigantes and Puerto Santiago. We offer salsa, bachata, and kizomba classes, workshops, courses
A social dance school in Los Gigantes, Tenerife. We offer salsa, bachata, and kizomba classes, workshops and courses.

item.title: Our partners
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" fullwidth="on" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_fullwidth_header title="Our partners" background_overlay_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.5)" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" background_image="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/320A0507.jpg" height="260px" global_colors_info="{}"]

We work together with a number of organisations in Tenerife that we consider our partners are can recommend their sevices. If you would like to partner with us or collaborate in some way get in contact with us.

[/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Turbo Rehab

Injury rehabilitation, sports injuries, back pain specialist, pilates and sports massage services. We are located in South Tenerife.

Arkadia Ballet and Fitness

Professional dance school in Tenerife/ Escuela profesional de baile, Tenerife, España

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][ba_card photo="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/320A0424.jpg" title="Contact us" description="

Are you interested in working with us or collaborating in some way? Get in touch now.

item.title: Bachata para principantes
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" min_height="453.8px" custom_margin="-87px|||||" custom_padding="0px||0px|||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" background_size="initial" background_position="top_left" background_repeat="repeat" min_height="593.6px" custom_padding="0px||0px||true|" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.16" custom_padding="|||" global_colors_info="{}" custom_padding__hover="|||"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" sticky_enabled="0"]

¡Bienvenidos a nuestro clases de bachata! ¿Te gustaría aprender a bailar y disfrutar de la magia de la bachata? Estas clases progresivo está diseñado para enseñarte los pasos básicos de la bachata social de una manera divertida y motivadora. Aprenderás la etiqueta en la pista de baile, cómo mantener una postura y equilibrio perfectos, y las técnicas esenciales para líderes y seguidores. Descubrirás el movimiento de la cintura, dominarás el tiempo y ritmo, y practicarás pasos, vueltas y giros básicos. Además, conocerás las posturas básicas en pareja y, lo más importante, ¡aprenderás a divertirte y a disfrutar cada momento en la pista de baile! Te esperamos a partir del 13 de Aogusto, todos los lunes a las 20:00 h en Arkadia Balet Studio en Puerto de Santiago. El precio total es de 35€ por 4 semanas o 10€ por un clase. ¡No pierdas la oportunidad de sumergirte en el maravilloso mundo de la bachata y hacer nuevos amigos mientras aprendes a bailar! ¡Anímate y únete a nosotros para pasarlo genial!

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_video src="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mXIgwjmSxGU" _builder_version="4.25.1" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_video][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" custom_margin="-2px|||||" global_colors_info="{}"]

Detalles del curso

Un course progresivo diseñado para enseñarte los pasos básicos de bachata social
Aprenderás:

  • Etiqueta en la pista de baile (pautas)
  • Postura y equilibrio
  • Técnicas de rol: líderes y seguidores
  • Moviemento de la cintura
  • Tiempo y ritmo
  • Pasos, vueltas, giros básicos
  • Posturas básicas de parejas
  • Cómo divertirse y pasarlo genial bailand

¿Dónde y cuándo?

Empezamos el día 13 de augusto, martes a las 20:00 h hasta las 21:30 en Arkadia Ballet Studio en Puerto de Santiago.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.25.1" _module_preset="default" global_module="649" collapsed="off" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_code _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" width="100%" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="||0px|||" global_colors_info="{}"]

Arkadia Ballet and Pilates
Calle Petunia 3 (Gigansol complex)
38683
Los Gigantes
Santa Cruz de Tenerife

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Duración y precio

Tenemos clases todos los martes 20:00 a 21:30. Es 10€ por un clase o puedes pagar 35€ al mes. Este nivel está activo de forma continua y puedes unirte cuando quieras.

Registro

Si tienes alguna duda ponte en contacto mediante email o teléfono en contact@bailacanarias.com / +34 629 17 82 42 o reserva tu plaza aqui.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_signup mailchimp_list="Baila Canarias|3ccaf47767" last_name_field="off" use_custom_fields="on" title="Reserva tu plaza ahora" button_text="Register" description="

Registrate con tu información para reservar tu plaza en este curso. Te enviaremos la información necesaria y otras notícias que te interesen. No te enviaremos nunca spam y puedes cancelar tu suscripción cuando quieras.

" _builder_version="4.25.1" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_signup_custom_field field_id="6" field_title="Main dance role" field_type="select" select_options="%91{%22checked%22:0,%22value%22:%22Leader%22,%22id%22:0,%22dragID%22:-1},{%22checked%22:0,%22value%22:%22Follower%22,%22id%22:1,%22dragID%22:0}%93" _builder_version="4.25.1" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" predefined_field="6"][/et_pb_signup_custom_field][et_pb_signup_custom_field field_id="35750e47a8" field_title="What styles are you interested in learning?" field_type="checkbox" checkbox_options="%91{%22checked%22:0,%22value%22:%22Salsa%22,%22id%22:%22066ad833ad%22,%22dragID%22:-1},{%22checked%22:1,%22value%22:%22Bachata%22,%22id%22:%220d52bf5395%22,%22dragID%22:0},{%22checked%22:0,%22value%22:%22Kizomba%22,%22id%22:%22d443a423e8%22,%22dragID%22:1}%93" required_mark="off" _builder_version="4.25.1" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" predefined_field="35750e47a8"][/et_pb_signup_custom_field][/et_pb_signup][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
item.excerpt:encoded: Aprende a bailar Bachata con Vaila Canarias en Puerto Santiago con nuestro clases de bachata principates desde cero.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
¡Bienvenidos a nuestro clases de bachata! ¿Te gustaría aprender a bailar y disfrutar de la magia de la bachata? Estas clases progresivo está diseñado para enseñarte los pasos básicos de la bachata social de una manera divertida y motivadora. Aprenderás la etiqueta en la pista de baile, cómo mantener una postura y equilibrio perfectos, y las técnicas esenciales para líderes y seguidores. Descubrirás el movimiento de la cintura, dominarás el tiempo y ritmo, y practicarás pasos, vueltas y giros básicos. Además, conocerás las posturas básicas en pareja y, lo más importante, ¡aprenderás a divertirte y a disfrutar cada momento en la pista de baile! Te esperamos a partir del 13 de Aogusto, todos los lunes a las 20:00 h en Arkadia Balet Studio en Puerto de Santiago. El precio total es de 35€ por 4 semanas o 10€ por un clase. ¡No pierdas la oportunidad de sumergirte en el maravilloso mundo de la bachata y hacer nuevos amigos mientras aprendes a bailar! ¡Anímate y únete a nosotros para pasarlo genial!
Detalles del curso
Un course progresivo diseñado para enseñarte los pasos básicos de bachata socialAprenderás:

Etiqueta en la pista de baile (pautas)
Postura y equilibrio
Técnicas de rol: líderes y seguidores
Moviemento de la cintura
Tiempo y ritmo
Pasos, vueltas, giros básicos
Posturas básicas de parejas
Cómo divertirse y pasarlo genial bailand

¿Dónde y cuándo?
Empezamos el día 13 de augusto, martes a las 20:00 h hasta las 21:30 en Arkadia Ballet Studio en Puerto de Santiago.

Arkadia Ballet and Pilates
Calle Petunia 3 (Gigansol complex)
38683
Los Gigantes
Santa Cruz de Tenerife

Duración y precio
Tenemos clases todos los martes 20:00 a 21:30. Es 10€ por un clase o puedes pagar 35€ al mes. Este nivel está activo de forma continua y puedes unirte cuando quieras.
Registro
Si tienes alguna duda ponte en contacto mediante email o teléfono en contact@bailacanarias.com / +34 629 17 82 42 o reserva tu plaza aqui.

Reserva tu plaza ahora

Registrate con tu información para reservar tu plaza en este curso. Te enviaremos la información necesaria y otras notícias que te interesen. No te enviaremos nunca spam y puedes cancelar tu suscripción cuando quieras.

item.title: Resources
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" fullwidth="on" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" max_height="1000px" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content" sticky_enabled="0"][et_pb_fullwidth_header title="Resources and tools for dancers" subhead="Are you looking for resurces to help you be a better dancer? Look no further, read through our list of tools that you can use to improve your understanding of music, dancing, culture and much more." background_overlay_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.5)" _builder_version="4.25.1" _module_preset="default" background_image="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DSC_6355-slider-e1712235521536.jpg" max_width="100%" min_height="300px" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content" sticky_enabled="0"][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" column_structure="3_5,2_5" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" type="3_5" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"]

Books

Bachata and Dominican Identity / La bachata y la identidad dominicana
by Julie A. Sellers B00NPAXMXO

Bachata: Social History of a Dominican Popular Music
by Deborah Pacini Hernandez ‎978-1566392990

Apps

E-musicality by Pierre Henry
A great webapp allowing to break music down by instruments and follow along with timing and phrasing. Super useful tool for teaching or learning musicality that all teachers should be utilising.

 

Music (albums, playlists and more)

Bachata Collection on Spotify

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_code _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"][/et_pb_code][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" hover_enabled="0" sticky_enabled="0"]

Bachata Breakdown on Spotify
By Carlos Cinta and Joan Soriano
"This is a great Bachata instructional CD that breaks down bachata, instrument by instrument. Bongo, Bass, Lead Guitar, Rhythm Guitar, Guira, they are all broken down so you can hear the role of each instrument in bachata music. Also, includes counts over the top of bachata music to teach dancers how to dance on all counts. I teach bachata dance and I use this CD in many of my classes and workshops. Its a great resource for both students and teachers and the only one of its kind that I know of. Carlos Cinta instructs on this CD to the music of bachatero Joan Soriano. Highly recommended." - Adam Taub, IASO Records

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" type="2_5" theme_builder_area="post_content"][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" fullwidth="on" theme_builder_area="post_content" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default"][/et_pb_section]

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Resources and tools for dancers

Are you looking for resurces to help you be a better dancer? Look no further, read through our list of tools that you can use to improve your understanding of music, dancing, culture and much more.
Books
Bachata and Dominican Identity / La bachata y la identidad dominicanaby Julie A. Sellers B00NPAXMXO
Bachata: Social History of a Dominican Popular Musicby Deborah Pacini Hernandez ‎978-1566392990

Apps
E-musicality by Pierre HenryA great webapp allowing to break music down by instruments and follow along with timing and phrasing. Super useful tool for teaching or learning musicality that all teachers should be utilising.
 
Music (albums, playlists and more)
Bachata Collection on Spotify

Bachata Breakdown on SpotifyBy Carlos Cinta and Joan Soriano”This is a great Bachata instructional CD that breaks down bachata, instrument by instrument. Bongo, Bass, Lead Guitar, Rhythm Guitar, Guira, they are all broken down so you can hear the role of each instrument in bachata music. Also, includes counts over the top of bachata music to teach dancers how to dance on all counts. I teach bachata dance and I use this CD in many of my classes and workshops. Its a great resource for both students and teachers and the only one of its kind that I know of. Carlos Cinta instructs on this CD to the music of bachatero Joan Soriano. Highly recommended.” – Adam Taub, IASO Records

item.title: Baila Canarias - Aprende Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba en Tenerife
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" inner_shadow="on" fullwidth="on" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" height="500px" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content" sticky_enabled="0"][et_pb_fullwidth_slider use_bg_overlay="on" bg_overlay_color="#000000" use_text_overlay="off" bg_overlay_color_tablet="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" bg_overlay_color_phone="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" bg_overlay_color_last_edited="off|desktop" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" header_font="||||||||" header_text_align="center" background_image="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DSC_6354-slider.jpg" custom_button="on" button_text_color="#FFFFFF" button_bg_color="#aa0727" button_border_width="0px" max_height="500px" custom_padding="112px|||||" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_slide heading="Aprende a bailar con nosotros" button_text="Nuevos grupos" button_link="/dance-with-us/" use_bg_overlay="on" bg_overlay_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.5)" use_text_overlay="off" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" background_enable_color="on" background_image="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/320A0505.jpg" background_enable_image="on" text_orientation="center" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" sticky_transition="on" theme_builder_area="post_content" sticky_enabled="0"]

Nuevas clases de salsa, bachata y kizomba para principiantes a partir de octubre. ¡Comienza tu viaje de baile con nosotros, aprende a bailar y diviértete al máximo!

[/et_pb_slide][/et_pb_fullwidth_slider][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" background_color="#f3ebdd" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_heading title="Are you ready to start your dance journey?" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" title_text_align="center" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][/et_pb_heading][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

We offer a variety of dance styles. Do you want to get lost in the mesmerising social circle of a Cuban Rueda? Move your hips to the rhythm of the conga? Find your soul in the guitars of Bachata? Whatever your needs, we got you.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][ba_card photo="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/320A0372.jpg" title="Salsa" description="

Cubano, Timba, Casino, Rueda. What are they you wonder? Come find out and take your first steps with us.

" image_height="200px" overlay_icon_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" overlay_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="gcid-d5f4cf15-2259-4c59-9dfb-100503dc1e96" min_height="380px" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-d5f4cf15-2259-4c59-9dfb-100503dc1e96%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][/ba_card][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][ba_card photo="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/Levi-Jade-Thumbnail.jpg" title="Bachata" description="

Música del Amargue. Bitterness, sadness, love, heartbreak, and the love of your life (for this week) what else could describe Bachata?

" image_height="200px" overlay_icon_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" overlay_color="RGBA(255,255,255,0)" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_color="gcid-d5f4cf15-2259-4c59-9dfb-100503dc1e96" min_height="380px" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-d5f4cf15-2259-4c59-9dfb-100503dc1e96%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][/ba_card][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}" theme_builder_area="post_content"][ba_card photo="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DSC_6354-slider.jpg" title="Kizomba" description="

With its rich culture, history, and even more beautiful music; you won't be able to resist falling in love with Kizomba.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Escuela de baile social en Tenerife en Los Gigantes y Puerto Santiago. Ofrecemos clases de salsa, bachata y kizomba, talleres, cursos
A social dance school in Los Gigantes, Tenerife. We offer salsa, bachata, and kizomba classes, workshops and courses.

Aprende a bailar con nosotros

Nuevas clases de salsa, bachata y kizomba para principiantes a partir de octubre. ¡Comienza tu viaje de baile con nosotros, aprende a bailar y diviértete al máximo!
Nuevos grupos

Are you ready to start your dance journey?

We offer a variety of dance styles. Do you want to get lost in the mesmerising social circle of a Cuban Rueda? Move your hips to the rhythm of the conga? Find your soul in the guitars of Bachata? Whatever your needs, we got you.

Salsa

Cubano, Timba, Casino, Rueda. What are they you wonder? Come find out and take your first steps with us.

Bachata

Música del Amargue. Bitterness, sadness, love, heartbreak, and the love of your life (for this week) what else could describe Bachata?

Kizomba

With its rich culture, history, and even more beautiful music; you won't be able to resist falling in love with Kizomba.

About us

Hi, we are Baila Canarias!

Social dancers by heart
We live for social dancing and our passion is to is spread this wonder to as many people as we can. Will you join our dance journey?
 
Contact us

Let's keep in touch

If you would to hear about our upcoming events, classes, courses, parties and events sign up for our mailing list. You will be first to hear about everything worth knowing. We take your privacy seriously and we will never spam you. If you change your mind you can unsubscribe anytime.

Mensaje de éxito

What styles are you interested in learning?

Suscribirse
Escuela de baile social en Tenerife en Los Gigantes y Puerto Santiago. Ofrecemos clases de salsa, bachata y kizomba, talleres, cursos

item.title: Aprende a bailar con nosotros
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" fullwidth="on" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" max_height="1000px" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_fullwidth_header title="Aprende a bailar con nosotros" subhead="¿Quieres unirte a nuestras clases y aprender a bailar? Estás en el lugar correcto, ofrecemos clases de salsa, bachata, kizomba, talleres, cursos, clases privadas y más. Puedes encontrar aquí nuestros próximos eventos y los que ya están en marcha." background_overlay_color="rgba(0,0,0,0.5)" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" background_image="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/DSC_6355-slider-e1712235521536.jpg" max_width="100%" min_height="300px" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="26px|||||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Clases y cursos actuales

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/Nadina-Levente-Demo-e1726400010348.jpg" title_text="Nadina-Levente-Demo-e1701173115424" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Lunes Bachata Nivel 0

Las clases semanales de los lunes se imparten en el B-Yard Food Court en Puerto Santiago. Todos los lunes de 17:45 a 18:45, la clase se divide en estilos de bachata moderna/sensual y tradicional para ayudarte a comprender el desarrollo de la bachata y cómo evolucionó desde la República Dominicana. Las clases cuestan 10 €/clase, o puedes pagar 30€ por cuatro clases. Ponte en contacto para unirte por correo electrónico o por teléfono en contact@bailacanarias.com / ‪+34 629 17 82 42‬

Ahora con descuento: toma tus primeras 4 clases por 20€

 

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/320A0527-e1726400546602.jpg" title_text="320A0527" _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="0px|||||" global_colors_info="{}"]

Lunes Bachata Nivel 1

Clases semanales los martes, de 16:45 a 17:45 en B-Yard Food Court en Puerto Santiago. Bachata Moderna/Estilo sensual y tradicional. Apto para personas que estén familiarizadas con los pasos básicos, técnicas de dirección y seguimiento y patrones de giro. Bienvenidos a unirse y pasarse, cualquier pregunta contact@bailacanarias.com / +34 629 17 82 42

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" background_color="#aa0726" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_signup mailchimp_list="Baila Canarias|3ccaf47767" last_name_field="off" use_custom_fields="on" title="Mantengámonos en contacto" description="

Si quieres estar al tanto de nuestros próximos eventos, clases, cursos, fiestas y eventos, suscríbete a nuestra lista de correo. Serás el primero en enterarte de todo lo que vale la pena saber. Nos tomamos muy en serio tu privacidad y nunca te enviaremos correo basura. Si cambias de opinión, puedes darte de baja en cualquier momento.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Learn to dance salsa, bachata, kizomba in Los Gigantes and Puerto Santiago in Tenerife. We offer weekly classes, workshops, events and more.
Learn to dance salsa, bachata, kizomba with Baila Canarias in Los Gigantes, Puerto Santiago in Tenerife. We offer weekly classes, workshops, events and parties.

Aprende a bailar con nosotros

¿Quieres unirte a nuestras clases y aprender a bailar? Estás en el lugar correcto, ofrecemos clases de salsa, bachata, kizomba, talleres, cursos, clases privadas y más. Puedes encontrar aquí nuestros próximos eventos y los que ya están en marcha.
Clases y cursos actuales
Lunes Bachata Nivel 0
Las clases semanales de los lunes se imparten en el B-Yard Food Court en Puerto Santiago. Todos los lunes de 17:45 a 18:45, la clase se divide en estilos de bachata moderna/sensual y tradicional para ayudarte a comprender el desarrollo de la bachata y cómo evolucionó desde la República Dominicana. Las clases cuestan 10 €/clase, o puedes pagar 30€ por cuatro clases. Ponte en contacto para unirte por correo electrónico o por teléfono en contact@bailacanarias.com / ‪+34 629 17 82 42‬
Ahora con descuento: toma tus primeras 4 clases por 20€
 
Lunes Bachata Nivel 1
Clases semanales los martes, de 16:45 a 17:45 en B-Yard Food Court en Puerto Santiago. Bachata Moderna/Estilo sensual y tradicional. Apto para personas que estén familiarizadas con los pasos básicos, técnicas de dirección y seguimiento y patrones de giro. Bienvenidos a unirse y pasarse, cualquier pregunta contact@bailacanarias.com / +34 629 17 82 42

Mantengámonos en contacto

Si quieres estar al tanto de nuestros próximos eventos, clases, cursos, fiestas y eventos, suscríbete a nuestra lista de correo. Serás el primero en enterarte de todo lo que vale la pena saber. Nos tomamos muy en serio tu privacidad y nunca te enviaremos correo basura. Si cambias de opinión, puedes darte de baja en cualquier momento.

Mensaje de éxito

What styles are you interested in learning?

Suscribirse

item.title: Donde bailar SBK in Tenerife? Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba
item.dc:creator: levente
item.content:encoded:
[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.16" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="30px|||3px||" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.4" _module_preset="default" hover_enabled="0" global_colors_info="{}" sticky_enabled="0"]

Salsa, bachata y Kizomba en Tenerife

Tenerife ofrece numerosos eventos en toda la isla para bailarines de salsa, bachata y kizomba. A continuación, se muestran algunas de las fiestas de baile social más populares. Aunque la mayoría de estos son eventos regulares, verifique si se llevan a cabo el mismo día, ya que suelen ocurrir cancelaciones y cambios. Si desea aprender a bailar, puede consultar nuestras clases y cursos de baile.

Fiestas de baile semanales

 

Lunes y martes

Los lunes y martes no hay fiestas semanales, sin embargo siempre puedes encontrar clases en las numerosas escuelas de baile de la isla.

Miercoles

Afrolatin Night Kendo Lounge Bar en Las Americas - Tenerife Sur Bachata y Salsa

Jueves

Tempo's Latinos Las Americas - Tenerife Sur Salsa y Bachata

Viernes

Deseo en Casablanca Las Americas - Tenerife South Bachata y salsa Baila Q' Baila Las Chafiras - Tenerife Sur Salsa, Bachata, Merengue

Sabado

Domingo

Latin Flow en Casablanca Las Americas - Tenerife South Bachata and Salsa Baila Q' Baila Las Chafiras - Tenerife Southeast Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][ba_card photo="https://www.bailacanarias.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/320A0372.jpg" title="Check our Instagram" description="

Follow us on Instagram to see the most up to date parties and socials on Tenerife.

" use_button="on" button_text="View Instagram" button_link="https://www.instagram.com/bailacanarias" is_new_window="on" image_height="201px" _builder_version="4.24.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/ba_card][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" background_color="gcid-11c3bc6b-adc8-4054-9a9e-9309c7f7bf07" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-11c3bc6b-adc8-4054-9a9e-9309c7f7bf07%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.24.2" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Estos son eventos regulares y siempre están sujetos a cambios. También hay muchos eventos adicionales ad hoc. Lo mejor es consultar Sociales en Tenerife para conocer los eventos más actualizados que se llevan a cabo.

Si buscas bailar en Gran Canaria, visita Live Gran Canaria.

item.title: Open Day! Try our dance classes for free without any commitment
item.dc:creator: levente

Have you wanted to try dancing but was too afraid to start? This is the perfect opportunity. Come try our clases of salsa, bachata, merengue and kizomba for free!

Location📍
B-Yard
Avenida Quinto Centenario
Puerto Santiago

One level down from the post office

Time 🗓️
18:00 Merengue
19:00 Salsa
20:00 Kizomba
21:00 Bachata

22:00-00:00 Fiesta!

Price 💶
Free! Invite your friends, come with your kids, family and everyone

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Baila Canarias

OPEN DAY

Try our classes for free without commitment here in Puerto Santiago.
Reserve your spot

Baila Canarias Open Day

Try our classes for free without commitment here in Puerto Santiago. The perfect chance to try something new and get to know us.
Reserve your spot

Saturday 26 October

Have you wanted to try dancing but was too afraid to start? This is the perfect opportunity. Come try our clases of salsa, bachata, merengue and kizomba for free!
Location📍B-YardAvenida Quinto CentenarioPuerto SantiagoOne level down from the post office
Time 🗓️18:00 Merengue19:00 Salsa20:00 Kizomba21:00 Bachata
22:00-00:00 Fiesta!
Price 💶Free! Invite your friends, come with your kids, family and everyone
Reserve your spot

Do I need a partner?

No! You can come, alone, with friends, family or your partner. Everyone is welcome. As each class is a taster session, we will be mostly dancing solo. 

I have two left feet! Can I come?

Of course! No one knows how to dance before they go to their first lessons! This day is deisgned so you can try out our classes with no previous dance experience 

What should I wear?

Comfortable sport shoes and clothes, if you want to dress a bit fancy thats fine, but we recommend not to wear heels.
Reserve your spot

"Levi and Balint changed my life, and for that I cannot be grateful enough. ❤"

– Orsi V-Sz

"... I would definitely recommend classes with Levi. He makes you understand the music as the language. And the classes are always fun and full of joy 🤩."

– Guniang Lola

"Fun classes, fun teachers, great atmosphere 😍"

– Sz Sz

Reserve your spot

Register now to save your place on our Open Day. You can try out all the classes for free without any commitment.

Success!
